name: Aniruddh Mishra
label: Electrical & Computer Engineering
subtitle: ECE Engineer × Researcher × Builder

paragraphs: I'm an Electrical and Computer Engineering (Honors) student at UT Austin, simultaneously completing a BBA through the Canfield Business Honors Program. I love doing hands-on research, industry internships, and hardware/software projects spanning VLSI, embedded systems, and power systems.
Currently interning at Apple on Physical Design, where I'm designing automation flows for Static Timing Analysis infrastructure.
When I'm not designing circuits or writing code, you'll find me running around Austin's trails or exploring the city's coffee scene.

education.school: The University of Texas at Austin

honors: Distinguished College Scholar — Cockrell School of Engineering & McCombs (2025)
